name: base
author: Danmaku
description: The built-in campaign: stage-1 and stage-2, their cast and bosses.

dialogue.speaker: warden
dialogue.text: I open nothing. I only hold.

dialogue.speaker: magistrate
dialogue.text: You have come a long way to be sentenced.

dialogue.speaker: magistrate
dialogue.text: Trespass. Persistence. The verdict is the same.

spread.description: parallel bolts that fan wider with each power tier

needle.description: parallel needles; concentration instead of coverage

homing.description: slow tracking shot; trades rate and speed for never missing

laser.description: stationary piercing beam; reach instead of a spread
